text.title: Coaching Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of coaching artifacts produced from this methodology — PR comment, pairing note, escalation log.

field.name: opening_question
field.constraint: ends in '?' AND does not state verdict

forbidden.pattern: pattern_identified == null AND coaching action taken (violates r1)
opening_question contains verdict words ("you should", "don't", "wrong") before junior response (violates r2)
pr_comment missing any of the 4 delta fields OR pr_comment.body < 60 chars (violates r4)
escalation_step jumps two levels in one occurrence OR stays at acknowledge after occurrence_count > 3 (violates r5)
pr_comment contains snark, sarcasm, or shaming language (e.g., "obviously", "lol", "really?")

allowed-transformations.transformation: Compress delta-format PR comment for trivial patterns (e.g., one-line mismatched naming) while preserving the 4 fields.
Promote a small_nudge to deep_pairing if the junior asks for it (junior-initiated learning is valuable).
Add a "junior_strength" field celebrating something specific the junior did well in the same PR (balances the coaching tone).

list.item: Specific pattern named from the library
Escalation step matches occurrence count progression
